summary: Updated git-branch-policy v1.9 + work-history-policy v1.14 + check-completion-gates new gate + INS-006-03 amendment

changes: Squash Merge run order to 2-commit pattern
Legacy 1-commit pattern deprecated with legacy_one_commit_reason escape
Post-merge Branch Cleanup gotcha note from INS-20260428-006-03

automation_changes.change: Loads logs/insights.jsonl, groups by source_task, blocks TASK_COMPLETED when actionable_doc_change/gotcha insights lack applied_to_doc.status=applied/commit/section

next_action: Run audit, append VALIDATION_RESULT, write report, append TASK_COMPLETED.

summary: Self-validation as Validator-A passed for 2-commit pattern and insight categorization

commands: npm run audit:harness: PASS (headers 20, ledgers 83, completion gates with new insight gate, quality 23 avg 96.0)
Gate positive: amendment INS-20260429-001-amend-of-INS-20260428-006-03 (category=gotcha, applied=applied, commit/section set) passes
Gate negative: INS-20260429-001-01 (category=observation) not subject to gate
Legacy exemption: INS-20260428-006-01/02/03 (no category) not subject to gate
